name: SWAMYS SCHOOL - MADANANDAPURAM

address.Address: Padmavathi Street Santhosh Nagar Madanandapuram, Mugalivakkam, Muthumariamman Nagar, Porur, Chennai, Tamil Nadu 600125, India

address.streetAddress: Padmavathi Street Santhosh Nagar Madanandapuram, Mugalivakkam, Muthumariamman Nagar, Porur, Chennai, Tamil Nadu 600125, India

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Teachers are worst and they treat new students with partiality. None of the opportunities are given to the newly joined students. There is no safety in the school at the time of pickup in the evening,
 They always blame the newly joined students and never understand or accept their own teachers mistakes.
Please don't choose this school as it will spoil your child's school life as we are the live example.
Taking care of kids are very lethargic, my kid is suffering a lot

Very partial to students, espessially if you havn't started with them from LKG, teachers show favourism for only to those students who are there from start, new students are not given care, very few teachers only take care of kids, others just make the students write the CW. No indepth knowledge is imparted.
Co-curricular activities are just for name sake. until u join the school acadamy for sports or other classes given for extra curriculam, your kid would never be given a chance to participate at all.

Kalanjali Campus principal Mam is approachable, always around to listen to the parents. It was a great year for our daughter. Suganya Mam (LKG) and Usha Mam (Pre.KG) discovered her talent and strength which we failed to recognise. Both are amazing teachers. We are fortunate to have them as our daughter's teacher.

I am very happy and proud that my daughter is an student of Swamy's school. My daughter is studying at Gitanjali campus. I must say that the teachers here are very good and caring. This school takes care of development for both education as well as extra curricular activities of their students.

Swamys school  is one of the best educational institutions in and around Porur. They have a lot of extra curricular activities to promote education and awareness regarding the world outside. They organized Project Day which showcased the scientific skills and innovative prowess of the children. All the teachers had put in a lot of hardwork to organise this expo. Kudos to the team.

Swamys school is the best school in porur. Both of my children are studying from prekg. For 10 th standard  students, they have taken a lot of effort by conducting coaching class, revision exam. All the teachers have taken a great effort .

My son is studying in this school from LKG. Till today we have no issues with the school. Especially this year for 10th std coaching , all the mam had put very much extra effort to bring up the children with flying colours.  I thank Mrs.Kanchana,Mrs.Bhanumathi,Mrs. Srivarshini,Mrs.Rekha,Mrs. Hema,Mrs Shanmugapeiya,,Mes Kavitha,Mrs Ramya and others for their enormous effort and care for public exam. They provided with so many materials and QB which helped a lot. Keep rocking mam.

One of the best school in porur, my daughter is studying 10th std.We, parent think that teachers are the back support and plays a vital role in building the future of the children. Every teachers of Swamy's helped the students to understand each and every concept and helped them persue better marks in their exams. Teachers worked more hard to make students to learn better.Repeated class tests, revision examinations, different kinds questions and classrooms interactions made them seçure more marks and build confidence in them. Physical and moral support of teachers to their students was extraordinary. Every subject teachers have put a lot of efforts in bringing up the children. We are grateful to thank Principal mam, Teachers and management for their efforts.

Excellent CBSE school in porur. My daughter is studying in 10th std. Teachers are well experienced and knowledgeable. School conducts many revision exams and provides rigorous training to prepare the students for the board exams. Nearly 5 revision exams for each subject plus regular periodic assessments really helped my daughter gain confidence. Seems the teachers also conducted additional coaching for struggling students throughout the year. The teachers were regularly sending sample papers and previous year question papers along with tips for study planning during the study holidays. Teachers patiently explain tough topics repeatedly whenever students ask. The level of complexity in the class tests have greatly helped the students preparedness for the board exams especially mathematics.
